name: Remote — Named Hosts via SSH
summary: Run commands on a NAMED remote host via SSH. Always include the 'host' param. Never use navig.run without host for local questions.

commands.name: run_on_host
commands.description: SSH to a named host and run a command. 'host' must be a name from navig config (e.g. 'ubuntu-node', 'ubuntu-node-vps'). Use for: 'disk on ubuntu-node', 'check server X', 'run X on Y host'.

commands.name: list_hosts
commands.description: List all configured remote hosts / nodes / VPS / servers. Use for: 'what hosts do I have', 'show servers', 'list nodes', 'list machines'.
commands.example: {"plan": [{"action": "command.run", "params": {"cmd": "navig host list"}, "description": "List all configured hosts"}], "message": "Listing your hosts"}

commands.name: check_host
commands.description: Test SSH connectivity to the active host.
